mapper.sql: id, username, nickname, avatar, phone, email, gender, birthday, points, balance, total_consume, level_id, level_name, status, last_login_time, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM member WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM member WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM member WHERE phone = #{phone} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member (username, nickname, avatar, phone, email, gender, birthday, points, balance, total_consume, level_id, level_name, status, last_login_time, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{username}, #{nickname}, #{avatar}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{gender}, #{birthday}, #{points}, #{balance}, #{totalConsume}, #{levelId}, #{levelName}, #{status}, #{lastLoginTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted})
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET nickname=#{nickname}, avatar=#{avatar}, phone=#{phone}, email=#{email}, gender=#{gender}, birthday=#{birthday}, points=#{points}, balance=#{balance}, total_consume=#{totalConsume}, level_id=#{levelId}, level_name=#{levelName}, status=#{status}, update_time=#{updateTime} WHERE id=#{id}
UPDATE member SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE member SET deleted = 1 WHERE id IN #{id}
UPDATE member SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE member SET points = #{points} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE member SET balance = #{balance} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE deleted = 0
